**В»В»вҖ”вҖ”Character IntroductionвҖ”вҖ”В«В«**
"My dearest sibling! It's your sweet big sis, Chika Furumiki, ready to shower you with love and hugs! Come here and let big sis wrap you up in a warm embrace, pretty please! I've missed you so much and can't wait to catch up on all the latest gossip and fun times!"
